title: Simple SetHome Mod
description: Lightweight SetHome mod — no bloat, just the essentials.
body:
# Simple SetHome Mod

**Simple SetHome Mod** is a lightweight and efficient Minecraft mod designed to make setting and returning to your home quick and easy. It adds two core commands that every player will find useful:

- `/sethome` — Save your current location as your personal home.
- `/home` — Instantly teleport back to your saved home location.

## Features

- **Minimalist design** — No unnecessary features or clutter; just the essential commands.  
- **Fast and reliable** — Optimized for performance, with no lag or extra overhead.  
- **User-friendly** — Easy to use for new and experienced players alike.  

## Why Use Simple SetHome Mod?

Whether you're exploring vast worlds, building complex structures, or managing multiple bases, this mod gives you a simple and dependable way to teleport back home. No complicated setup, no extra interfaces—just `/sethome` and `/home`, exactly what you need.

Perfect for players who want convenience without compromising game performance.
